what_was_built: reports/arbitrage_data_source_evaluation_v1/data_source_evaluation.md (human-readable: 6 source-class evaluations + 15-field decision matrix with allowed_now=False everywhere + approval gates + rejection rules + required metadata + risks + quality dimensions + future allowed/forbidden plans + required future artifacts + PASS/WATCH/FAIL + no-profit-claim policy + safety boundaries)
tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py: extra_files extended with the new evaluation docs (lane stays IDEA)

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: A data source does not imply edge
Clean data does not imply profit
Source approval does not authorize trading

tests_run.command: python -m pytest tests/test_arbitrage_data_source_evaluation.py tests/test_arbitrage_qa_harness_spec.py tests/test_arbitrage_dataset_manifest.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_contract.py tests/test_arbitrage_research_protocol.py tests/test_strategy_candidate_registry.py tests/test_strategy_next_bundle.py --rootdir=tests -q

guardrails_held: lane is not promoted to ACTIVE just because additional docs exist
lane never reaches STRONG evidence in the auto-build path

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Deterministic logic NOT artificially modified. Operator should consult report.md `recommended_next_bundle` for the actual Bundle 9 choice.

how_it_fits_after_qa_harness_spec_v1: Arbitrage Research Protocol v1 (30dabc4) -> Arbitrage Data Contract v1 (c4d4c8b) -> Arbitrage Dataset Manifest v1 (492fcc1) -> Arbitrage QA Harness Spec v1 (8073bf3) -> Arbitrage Data Source Evaluation Memo v1 (this bundle).
Subsequent bundles (Arbitrage Sample Dataset Plan v1, Arbitrage Research Readiness Gate, P2 data acquisition, ...) are each separately authorized.
recommended_next_bundle: Arbitrage Sample Dataset Plan v1 (pre-acquisition plan for the first concrete dataset; plan only, no fetch)
Arbitrage Research Readiness Gate (written readiness checklist before authorizing the first P2 acquisition; gate spec only)
Crypto-D1 Protocol Memo (alternative lane, currently PARKED; would require a new hypothesis, not a re-tune)
